cards.back: おはようございます (ohayou gozaimasu)

cards.notes: Used from late morning to early evening.
Formal; casual alternatives: じゃね (ja ne), またね (mata ne)

cards.back: ありがとうございます (arigatou gozaimasu)

cards.notes: Used for apologies, getting attention, and expressing gratitude.
Used when meeting someone for the first time.

cards.front: Please take care of me / Best regards
cards.back: よろしくお願いします (yoroshiku onegaishimasu)
cards.notes: Often follows はじめまして in introductions.

cards.back: お元気ですか (ogenki desu ka)
cards.notes: Not used as frequently as in English; mainly after not seeing someone for a while.

cards.front: I'm going out / See you later (when leaving home)
cards.notes: Response: いってらっしゃい (itterasshai) — Take care!
